1=Add new record
2=Modify existing record
3=Inactivate existing record
607 X0150_CRCTN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD X0150_CRCTN_PRVDR_TYPE_CD X0150 Correction Provider Type Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the type of provider (nursing home or swing bed) submitting the modification or inactivation request. 1=Nursing home (SNF/NF)
2=Swing bed effective 10/01/2023
608 X0300_CRCTN_SEX_CD1 X0300_CRCTN_SEX_CD X0300 Correction Sex Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the resident's sex from
